authority_boundary.review_components: transient non-colliding HISM components tagged RaftSim_ExternalReviewOnly
authority_boundary.replaced_for_capture: four visible temporary PVE foliage actors only

accepted_findings: The physical-corridor transform can map the source vegetation and water masks into Unreal world coordinates while retaining Landscape height authority.
Slope, elevation, aspect, riparian setback, natural-gap, and 15 m spacing rules produce a deterministic 1,200-tree review layer in both camera views.
The eight independent coigue forms and full, intermediate, and V12 runtime-far representations can be placed through transient HISM components without collision or saved-map changes.
The runtime-far family remains the retained 94-percent-reduced technical LOD candidate; this review does not revoke the isolated V12 resource result.
rejection_reasons: The replacement reduces green-dominant image coverage from 0.5098 percent to 0.0011 percent in the guide-seat view and from 0.3582 percent to 0.0349 percent in the river-eye view.
The accepted trees read as bare dark trunks, black crown clumps, and elongated black ground/shadow marks instead of continuous Patagonian temperate-rainforest canopy.
The source-authorized placement around these cameras begins in the 300 m representation band, leaving the river-adjacent slopes visually empty rather than supplying a convincing riparian transition.
The smooth 30 m terrain, flat provisional water response, sparse boulder detail, and absent understory remain dominant and prevent a lifelike corridor even if the tree material is repaired.
There is still only one native species family, no sapling, shrub, fern, bamboo, deadwood, or epiphyte strata, and no guide/ecology approval.
Moving-camera LOD transitions, temporal wind, masked overdraw, streaming, packaged desktop, and on-device VR performance remain unvalidated.
next_iteration_requirements: Compile and persist explicit InstancedStaticMeshes material usage before placement, then isolate the corridor leaf-opacity, transmission, shadow, and distance-mip failure under source-map lighting.
Author distance-stable opaque or alpha-preserving crown clusters that retain green mass at 300-1000 m without black cards, shadow carpets, or bare-trunk silhouettes.
Add at least one second ecology-reviewed native canopy species plus near-bank sapling, shrub, fern/bamboo, epiphyte, and deadwood strata using the same source masks and terrain bands.
Expand source-conditioned placement beyond the 300 m review strip only after validating the vegetation-mask interpretation against aerial imagery and guide/ecology references.
Repeat paired guide-seat, river-eye, and moving-camera captures, then profile masked overdraw, draw calls, streaming, culling, packaged desktop, and on-device VR cost before any promotion.
